auth.creator: Creator
auth.signup_submitted: Signup request received. If email verification is enabled, please check your email and log in again.
auth.login_success: Logged in. You can continue publishing.
auth.config_detail: Please add the project URL and public key to assets/supabase-config.js first.
auth.config_detail_upload: The project URL and public key must be set in assets/supabase-config.js for uploads to work.
auth.config_ready: Episodes can be published once the connection is configured.
auth.auth_boot_error: Login connection failed. Please try again later.
auth.validate_password_length: Password must be at least 6 characters.
auth.signup_email_sent: Verification email sent. Please check your inbox.
auth.service_error: Service connection failed. Please try again later.

editor.restore_confirm: Replace current content with this version. Continue?
editor.episode_title_placeholder: e.g. Chapter 2: The Night the Forbidden Book Stirred
editor.publish_address_error: Episode saved but redirect URL not found.
editor.no_works_message: You need to publish a work first before adding episodes.
editor.author_note: You can only add episodes to your own works.
editor.auth_gate_subtitle: Log in to add new episodes
editor.auth_gate_desc: Only works uploaded by your account will appear in the selection.
editor.auth_gate_note: Log in with the same account you used on the upload page to see your works.
editor.auth_gate_empty: Log in to access the episode publishing form.
editor.add_episode_title: Publish the next episode for an existing work
editor.add_episode_desc: Select a work and the next episode number will be assigned automatically, along with free or paid access settings.
editor.select_desc: Work info on the left will be filled automatically after login based on your uploaded works.
editor.guide_free: Free episodes will have price set to 0 automatically. Paid episodes will save with the entered price.
editor.guide_redirect: After publishing, you'll be redirected to the reader for the new episode.

viewer.teaser_fallback: Only the preview for the next episode is available.
viewer.paywall_note: Episodes after this are paid. Buy during a sale for a discount.
viewer.paywall_next: Payment required to read the next episode.

library.login_subtitle: Log in to see your reading progress and purchase history.
library.no_reading_hint: Browse the store and start reading a novel.
library.no_bookmarks_hint: Tap the ♥ button on a work's detail page to bookmark it.
library.no_purchases_hint: Purchased paid episodes will appear here.

store.hero_subtitle: Works where the cover speaks before the title
store.sale_banner_subtitle: The next sale is on its way
store.filter_instruction: Click filters to toggle include / exclude
store.no_results_hint: Try fewer keywords or removing some filters.

dashboard.featured_empty_hint: Upload a new work to see your latest work and episode info here.
dashboard.no_works_hint: Go to the upload page and create your first work with a title and first episode.
dashboard.filtered_empty: No works with this status yet
dashboard.filtered_empty_hint: Try a different filter to see other works.
dashboard.auth_note: Only works published by this account will be shown.
dashboard.auth_gate_subtitle: Log in to see your works
dashboard.auth_gate_desc: Your author profile and work list will be linked after login.
dashboard.auth_gate_note: Log in with the same account you used on the upload page to see your works.
dashboard.login_subtitle: Log in to manage your works.

upload.preview_empty: Enter content to preview how it will look to readers.
upload.cover_format_error: Cover must be JPG, PNG, WEBP, or GIF.
upload.cover_selected: Cover selected. It will be uploaded when you publish.
upload.episode_title_required: Please enter the first episode title.
upload.body_required: Please enter the first episode content.
upload.publish_address_error: Work saved but redirect URL not found.
upload.auth_note: You can upload covers and publish works right away.
upload.auth_gate_subtitle: Log in to upload your work
upload.auth_gate_desc: Your work will be saved under your account's author name.
upload.auth_gate_note: New here? Sign up. Already have an account? Log in. You can publish right after.
